text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, I'm so excited! I can't wait for the Japan
Cup to start!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
The lineup is too impressive! There's the Beast,
Oguri Cap, then there's White Lightning, Tamamo
Cross!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Hey, you're forgetting someone important!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
The prettiest Umamusume of this generation,
Gold City! She'll definitely win today!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: They're going crazy out there.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Just listening to it is making me restless.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Is it just me, or do you always act like I'm some
nervous wreck? I'm fine.
Go and run like yourself.
Go and run like yourself.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Well, I guess this isn't the first time you've told
me to be myself.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You've always told me to run my own way.
Always...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You know... why did you let me keep racing?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I was complaining literally every second, not to
mention how unfair my manager was to you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You even completely disregarded what I wanted
at one point. That must've been hard for you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But you still let me run... Why?

I promise I'll keep you on the track no matter
what.

I promise I'll keep you on the track no matter
what.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Is that it?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Not for me? Or yourself? Or even the fans?
choice_data_list: I knew you wanted to run.
I knew you wanted to run.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Haha... Seriously, you're something else.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But you know, I'm glad I chose an overbearing
pain in the ass for my trainer... I really am.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, wipe that stupid grin off your face.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You can show me it after the race, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Time to get out there and be me!
